case_title: ELTON JEREMIAH RAINS VS. JESSICA GASTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAINS, ELTON JEREMIAH AS TO DEFENDANT GASTON, JESSICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
